mentions.note: Down 22% on AI displacement (Claude aggregator threat) and Europe exposure (high energy costs). 17.6% EPS growth at 17x PE; war impact likely priced in. When conflict ends, vacation demand surges.
Anomaly—booking platforms weak while airlines, Airbnb, Marriott strong; highly unusual pattern; war-driven uncertainty impacting advanced trip planning.
Part of 'Big Five Travel' thesis; online travel platform benefits from travel boom.
